message:
feat(spork): ChildName newtype for zero-cost supervisor name cloning (bd-3h23x)

Introduce ChildName(Arc<str>) to eliminate O(n) String clones in the
supervisor restart-plan hot path. All supervision types now use ChildName
instead of String. Three allocation gate tests verify Arc sharing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
